programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E7 - Game Over
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: E5 - Adam Matos
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: E11 - Murder Mastermind Or Innocent Witness?
programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case murder of a young Marine who was killed in a hotel room and charge the woman who was with him at the time. Is she the mastermind behind his death or an innocent victim?

programme.title: E201 - Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E804 - Mandy Mouse
programme.desc: There is a new friend at Peppa's playgroup - Mandy Mouse. Mandy has a wheelchair, is very sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: E806 - Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.title: E912 - Breakfast Bots
programme.desc: Can Robot Blaze stop the Breakfast Bots before they bury Axle City in breakfast?

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: E249 - The Powercut
programme.desc: One day all the lights suddenly go out and Peppa's house is plunged into darkness. There has been a power cut. While they wait for the electricity to come on again, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E718 - Super Wheels Vs. The Green Queen
programme.desc: The Green Queen is turning everything in Axle City... green! Luckily Blaze, Watts, and Darington can transform into superheroes! Can they stop The Green Queen before Axle City is one color forever?

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save The Orienteers / Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park. // Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save The Orienteers / Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park. // Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa!

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E2 - Slammin' Salmon
programme.desc: Join the frantic dash to cash in on July’s salmon run with the Stage 1 winners and some tough new recruits. Tag along on BigBoi's food-finding road trip, welcome QuadMom and RedBack to the feast, and see if BoldFace can keep her surviving cub safe.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks mentors a chef jeopardizing a local favorite spot in Port Jefferson, NY, a chef who refuses to change the menu at a seafood restaurant in New Haven, CT.

programme.title: E1 - Truckin Awesome Surviving Savannah
programme.desc: Nine food trucks kick off their eight-city Atlantic Coast race in Savannah, where they tackle a banana-themed challenge from the Savannah Bananas.

programme.title: E4 - Have A Little Faith
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks mentors a chef jeopardizing a local favorite spot in Port Jefferson, NY, a chef who refuses to change the menu at a seafood restaurant in New Haven, CT.

programme.title: E1 - Truckin Awesome Surviving Savannah
programme.desc: Nine food trucks kick off their eight-city Atlantic Coast race in Savannah, where they tackle a banana-themed challenge from the Savannah Bananas.

programme.title: Savi
programme.desc: Savi a simple housewife attempts a daring jailbreak to get her husband out of one of high security prisons With 400 inmates, 75 armed guards, 60 surveillance cameras.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Of Mubarakan
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Luv Ki Arrange Marriage
programme.desc: Luv is in love with Ishika and wants to ask for her hand in marriage. A laughter riot follows when his widowed father falls in love with Ishika's mother. Which couple has a more successful love story?

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! Then, YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The creative fun continues as they record cool sounds with a cassette player, pretend to be a train & play a game of 'The Floor is Lava' in the living room! It's a month of imagination & creativity!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E12 -Fantastic Feast Of Fowl
programme.desc: Head Judge Curtis Stone puts the chefs to the ultimate test when they must keep up with him to perfectly re-create one of his signature dishes. Then, there’s magic in the air as the chefs take up their wands and are transported to the Wizarding World for a fantastic feast inspired by Harry Potter. Each chef is filled with joy to create a celebratory feast using whole game birds, which they’ll serve in a Top Chef Junior Dining Room transformed into the Great Hall. Gail Simmons & game meats expert, Tim Love, are the guest judges… and for the first time in Top Chef Junior history, our chefs sit down with the judges’ to share a meal!

Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Special Samurai Drama 'Nemuri Kyoshiro'
programme.desc: The blue-eyed ronin Nemuri Kyoshiro (Hasegawa Hiroki) is hired by Takebe Senjuro (Takuma Shin), an aide to Mizuno Tadakuni, to eliminate spies targeting Tadakuni. While investigating them, he encounters the sister of one of the spies, a secret Christian named Kayaba Shizuka (Kuroshima Yuina). However, fearing exposure, her group's leader Bizenya (Jinbo Satoshi) orders Kyoshiro's death. At the same time, Senior Inspector Matsudaira Mondonosho (Bando Yajuro) also orders his retainer to kill him.

programme.title: E7 - En Vadrouille Does Its Cabaret
programme.desc: In Villerest, Bijou opens the doors of his cabaret to Loic Ballet. Meryl and Victoria present him the art of wig creation, and Pascal introduces him to rare fruits.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E1 - The Gotthard Panorama Express, Between Lake Lucerne And Ticino
programme.desc: The legendary Gotthard Panorama Express links the German and Italian-speaking regions of Switzerland, via the historic Gotthard tunnel. Along the way the train offers impressive views of the sun-drenched landscapes and villages of Ticino.

programme.title: E80
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E80
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E4 - Complete And Energy Efficient Transformation Of A House
programme.desc: Off to Schaerbeek to discover the transformation of a terraced house which, before the renovation work, was the oldest home on the street! Also featured: the Steel Sauvage ironwork workshop; the Murtoli estate in southern Corsica; repairing and repainting a brick wall.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E11 - Thierry Marx/Pigeon Lofts/Dao/Flowers
programme.desc: The fabulous story of the chef Thierry Marx and the Eiffel Tower. Did you know that pigeon lofts were a visible sign of wealth in the Middle Ages? The eco-friendly brand Dao takes on the challenge of producing linen jeans made in France. How to wear a floral pattern.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: The GoldenPass Belle Epoque is a historical train. Twice a day, it carries its passengers from Montreux to the Bernese Oberland, through the picturesque vineyards of Lavaux, the Gruyere Valley and the jet-set destination of Gstaad.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!
programme.desc: From the costume workshop to the sets and the accessory stockroom, a tour of the Liege Opera where ''Traviata'' is performed. Also featuring director Jean-Marie Poire, landscape designer Alexandre Vandiest, Patrick Syen's Bentleys, and soprano Louise Foor.

programme.title: E17 - In Chinon (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's architecture and a prominent figure of the region, Rabelais.

programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland

programme.title: E11 - Mathias Bensimon/Haider Ackermann/Salome Cousseau
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: E7 - Virton
programme.desc: We head off to Virton, the capital of the Gaume region, which shares the title of ''sunniest region in Belgium'' with the coast! On the programme: the Baillet-Latour museum; the Wind Horse farm; downhill quad biking; city trip to Besancon...

programme.desc: Where would you go if you received a note from your loved one saying only Meet me there? Series looks at the emotional attachment people have with places and explores how an individual's memory of a shared place can differ from those he/she shared it with.

programme.title: E203 - J-LAD / Big Honey

programme.title: E123 - One of the Boys / A Tattler’s Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: E193 - Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. // To defend Bikini Bottom’s honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: E106 - Gas Station Vacation / Bunny the Barbarian
programme.desc: The Star Family heads to their favorite resort. // Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: E204 - The Summer I Turned Giddy
programme.desc: Upset that Phoebe has a new partner, Max decides to partner with his friend Gideon. But things backfire when Max tries to turn Gideon into a supersized superhero. Chloe's friends pretend to be wealthy so they can bond with her new crush.

programme.title: E514 - My Dinner with Bigfoot
programme.desc: When the gang befriends Bigfoot in the woods, Kid Danger and Captain Man try to help get rid of a pesky hunter that's been trying to capture him.

programme.title: E327 - The Slap Fight
programme.desc: Tori and the gang compete to see who can get the most followers on The Slap. But when they get caught up in the competition, they neglect their schoolwork, and their friendships.

programme.desc: Amanda and Alan divide and conquer as they renovate the bathrooms. Amanda has big plans for converting one of the medieval tower rooms into a double-height sumptuous en-suite.

programme.title: E7 - Custard Week
programme.desc: It's custard week on The Great South African Bake Off and the bakers kick things off with a Franginpane Tart with Creme Anglaise. programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: E7 - Avenue Of The Baobabs, Madagascar
programme.desc: GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees. Can the Go Jetters rescue a baby lemur in time?

programme.title: E10 - Recital
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: E24 - The Memory Badge
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E13 - Raspberry
programme.desc: Raspberry sings a song, saying it's cool to be kind.

programme.title: E23 - Wonder Pea
programme.desc: Supertato is delighted when Evil Pea becomes his sidekick but it's all a trick and Evil Pea captures him! Evil Pea is forced to do a good deed because one of the Cobs needs help.

programme.title: E24 - Trouble Bubbles
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant bubble together. They float through the air until Supertato and Evil Pea pop the bubble by driving it into a supermarket sign.

programme.title: E6 - Ice Scream
programme.desc: Betty the ice cream van is so full of ice cream that it's making her speed around town out of control. It's up to Mojo and Bo with the racer top to stop her and save those treats!

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E22 - The Pool
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E38 - The Nature Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels can learn more about nature and wildlife if they follow five easy steps: watch carefully, stay at a distance, don't interfere, be patient and alert, and stay quiet.

programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E23 - Shops
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E7 - Towel
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: E38 - The Nature Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels can learn more about nature and wildlife if they follow five easy steps: watch carefully, stay at a distance, don't interfere, be patient and alert, and stay quiet.

programme.title: E37 - The Dos And Don'ts Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are causing a bit too much mess in the clubhouse, so Duggee explains that they need to think more carefully about what they are doing.

programme.title: E9 - Seattle Space Needle, USA
programme.desc: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space.

programme.title: E8 - Venice, Italy
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: E38 - Cinema Scoot
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck join Scooter Boy at the cinema to watch his favourite film.

programme.title: E10 - Recital
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: E24 - Trouble Bubbles
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant bubble together. They float through the air until Supertato and Evil Pea pop the bubble by driving it into a supermarket sign.

programme.title: E25 - Not So Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato into believing he has no superpowers without his red cape. When he rescues his friends without his cape he discovers he has superpowers cape or no cape!

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: E82
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

E29
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.desc: Terrie and Philippe are looking for a four-bedroom home for their blended family, but in Dawson City, a town of less than 1,500 people; do they have a better chance of finding gold than a house?

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E3 - Bear in Focus
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne joins his foodie friend Amy Luttrell to help cook breakfast for his friends at the Bonorong Wildlife Sanctuary after having a cuddle with some of Tasmania’s unique animals. On his way down to Hobart Ben stops off at a boutique, family-owned Stefano Lubiana Winery, which overlooks the picturesque River Derwent.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E19 - 「音緣」好友大聚會 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E19 - 「音緣」好友大聚會 (上)

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: On the Grid
programme.desc: Ahoy there! In this episode we unearth the key to reading maps with gridlines and join Eric in his search for a hidden treasure.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: The It Kid
programme.desc: Naomi's a contestant on Clay TV's “The It Kid,” with cameras tracking her every move. She tries to show how cool and caring she is-until Jessi's quirky charm steals the spotlight. As Jessi climbs the votes, Naomi scrambles to win back the attention she's lost.

programme.title: The Frog in The Fog
programme.desc: A heavy sea fog rolls in while Darwin and Burpee are on the island, so Newts and Kea need to build a lighthouse to help them navigate the waka home.

programme.title: Engaging Engineering
programme.desc: How do simple building elements create architecture? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of construction. Have hands-on fun by building your own tower, and get to know Fazlur Rahman Khan, who came up with the ‘tube' structure in skyscraper design.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Haunted Beauty Salon
programme.desc: Ms. Bell's wedding is in peril when a ghost scares away the customers from the beauty salon where everyone is getting ready for the ceremony. But Addison thinks the rumbling and drafts might have natural causes.

programme.title: I Love Rock and Roll
programme.desc: The day Springbok discovers his echo turns out to be a lot more eventful that one would imagine.

programme.title: Dinner At Bumble's
programme.desc: Bumble invites Sprinter and Leo for dinner because she wants to cook them delicious dishes from Earth. Leo is looking forward to eating food she knows from back home. But Bumble has never tasted food from Earth. How will she know how to make it?

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Okefenokee Doki
programme.desc: The mosquitoes are driving Oto crazy, so he and Doki build a ‘bug trapper' device to solve the problem. To Mundi, this is wrong. What good are pesky flies and mosquitoes, anyway? Mundi makes off with the device in the plane, and hides it in Georgia's Okefenokee Swamp!

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Utah adventure: White water rafting near Salt Lake City, bobsled racing at Utah Olympic Park, fearless rappelling in Moab, and off-the-grid dinosaur excavation. A week of thrilling escapades with Nicole and local teens in the great state of Utah!

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Fire Engine
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Fire Engine. It's his first day on the job and he's a little nervous when he gets a call about a cat stuck up a tree.

programme.title: Jumping Spider
programme.desc: Bouncing beetles or leaping ladybugs. You can make any jumping insect you like. We'll show you how to make a spider with serious spring!

programme.title: To Catch a Fish
programme.desc: How can Oto catch a fish without a fishing rod? Doki and Mundi set out on a spy mission to discover how the other international teams are doing it, and come up with some fun and surprising alternatives!

programme.title: Secret Message!
programme.desc: Eric learns that, with a little science, you can bring out all the colours that make up the black ink in felt tip markers. He separates the colours using chromatography. This gives him a way to write secret messages.

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Haunted Beauty Salon
programme.desc: Ms. Bell's wedding is in peril when a ghost scares away the customers from the beauty salon where everyone is getting ready for the ceremony. But Addison thinks the rumbling and drafts might have natural causes.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: Jackie the Condor is having his adventures, and Baron calls on him for help. Baron gives him an assistant Chinese scholar Ada, to locate and take back the gold hidden by the Nazis.

programme.desc: When Yau argues with his wife Jessica for the uneven share of dirty money, he shoots her in coma. To find out the money, Yau hires Sister Ma to look after her...

programme.title: The Legend Of Zu
programme.desc: Between the heaven and the Earth exist the Zu's mountain range, where live the immortals of Omei, the highest mountain of Zu, but the kingdom is in danger by Amnesia...

programme.title: Faithfully Yours (1995)
programme.desc: Cheung is a veteran dubbing artist, happily married to Kitty and have a daughter. One night, Kitty has a nightmare that Hong Kong dollar is going to plunge. She wakes up and demands that the whole family to emigrate. While they are busily arranging the emigration matters, Cheung is promoted. Kitty then decided Cheung should stay in Hong Kong as to earn more money and she and their daughter will stay and wait in Canada. Cheung who stayed alone in Hong Kong, thus begins the affair with his beautiful boss. When Kitty learns Cheung's affair, she threatens a divorce. Meanwhile, Cheung finds his boss is only frustrated him, Cheung quits and leaves for Canada where Kitty is already pregnant their second child...

Overheard 3
programme.desc: Five Years ago, LAW was jailed for killing a major land owner in a car accident. At that time LAW worked as a chauffeur for the rural tycoon LUK. It was rumored that LUK was behind such land owner's death, which gave LUK a competitive edge in the native apartment development deal. Before the Hong Kong handover in 1997, every native, male resident in the New Territories was granted the right to build a house. Yet it had caused social unrest over the land right, until recently the government decided to gather all of the remaining land rights from these residents and plan to build taller apartment buildings. LUK wished to swallow the enormous project and this started the fights between LUK, the land owner and other real estate developers. When LAW gets out of prison five years later, the world has changed...
